nodes.name: Webhook - Receive Lead
nodes.notes: SETUP: Copy the webhook URL and paste it into your website contact form, Typeform, or any lead capture tool. POST body should include: name, email, phone (optional), message (optional), source.

nodes.name: Validate & Normalize Data
nodes.notes: Normalizes field names from any form builder. Validates email. Scores the lead 0-100 based on data completeness.

nodes.name: Add to Google Sheet CRM
nodes.notes: SETUP: Create a Google Sheet with columns: Lead ID, Name, Email, Phone, Company, Message, Source, Score, Status, Created At. Replace sheet ID above.

nodes.name: Push to CRM API (Optional)
nodes.notes: OPTIONAL: Replace URL and API key with your CRM (HubSpot, Pipedrive, GoHighLevel, etc.). Delete this node if using Google Sheets only. For HubSpot: use https://api.hubapi.com/crm/v3/objects/contacts

parameters.subject: Thanks for reaching out, {{ $json.name.split(' ')[0] }}! 👋
parameters.message:
Hey {{ $json.name.split(' ')[0] }}, thanks for getting in touch!

We've received your message and will get back to you within 24 hours.

Here's what you submitted:

  • Name: {{ $json.name }}
  • Email: {{ $json.email }}
    • {{ $json.company ? '
  • Company: ' + $json.company + '
    • ' : '' }}

In the meantime, feel free to check out our work at our website.


Best,
[REPLACE_WITH_YOUR_NAME]
[REPLACE_WITH_COMPANY_NAME]

nodes.name: Send Lead Confirmation Email
nodes.notes: CUSTOMIZE: Edit the confirmation email. The lead gets this immediately after submitting.

parameters.subject: 🔥 New Lead: {{ $json.name }} (Score: {{ $json.score }}/100)
parameters.message:
New Lead Alert

Lead ID{{ $json.leadId }}
Name{{ $json.name }}
Email{{ $json.email }}
Phone{{ $json.phone || 'Not provided' }}
Company{{ $json.company || 'Not provided' }}
Source{{ $json.source }}
Lead Score{{ $json.score }}/100
Message{{ $json.message || 'None' }}

nodes.name: Notify Business Owner
nodes.notes: SETUP: Replace REPLACE_WITH_OWNER_EMAIL with the business owner's email.

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ success: true, leadId: $json.leadId, message: 'Lead captured successfully' }) }}

nodes.name: Webhook Response
nodes.notes: Returns a 200 OK response to the form/webhook caller with the lead ID.

motionElevation.description: Webhook-based lead capture. Validates and scores the lead, logs to Google Sheets, optionally pushes to a CRM API, confirms receipt to the lead, and alerts the business owner.
